_comment: Fleet Commander → Codex CLI adapter. Installed to ~/.codex/hooks.json by `node scripts/install-codex.mjs`, which replaces __FLEET_SCRIPTS__ with this plugin's absolute scripts dir. Codex and Claude Code share the same hook stdin shape and the same PreToolUse allow/deny stdout protocol, so the SAME forwarder.mjs + approve-hook.mjs serve both — only FLEET_AGENT differs. Codex `timeout` is in SECONDS (default 600), same as Claude. Codex lacks SessionEnd / Notification / PostToolUseFailure, so those rows are omitted; Stop covers turn-end stat refresh.
